name: OpenManus Bridge
description: Fast WebSocket IPC to OpenManus Python agent — streams thoughts/tools back to OpenClaw channels.

interceptAgent.description: Route all channel messages to OpenManus via before_agent_reply hook

telegramProgress.description: Show live progress bar in Telegram during Manus runs

botToken.description: Telegram bot token for progress messages (defaults to channels.telegram.botToken)

proxyUrl.description: HTTP proxy for Telegram Bot API (defaults to channels.telegram.proxy or TG_PROXY)

wsUrl.label: Manus Bridge WebSocket URL
wsUrl.help: Local OpenManus IPC server (python -m bridge.ws_server). No CLI per message.
